perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark wavy hair is seen in a close-up shot, smiling and looking directly at the camera. She is wearing a dark blue halter-neck dress with a gold pattern and a white shawl draped over her shoulders. (2) She speaks with expressive facial movements, nodding slightly and tilting her head as she talks. (3) The camera remains static throughout the video, focusing on her upper body and face against a plain, light-colored wall.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in Mandarin throughout the video with a polite and cheerful tone. (2) A soft, upbeat background music track with a moderate tempo plays continuously. (3) No significant ambient noise or sound effects are detected, suggesting a quiet indoor recording environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Uncle Auntie 好' - A greeting to elders, polite tone. (2) '我是你儿子的女朋友' - Self-introduction as the son's girlfriend, functional. (3) '淑芬' - The woman's name, functional. (4) '今年的过年我有做工' - Stating she has to work during the New Year, informative. (5) '所以没有办法陪他回去看你们哦~' - Explaining why she cannot visit, explanatory. (6) '祝你们新年快乐 万事如意 身体健康 恭喜发财' - Traditional Chinese New Year greetings and blessings, festive tone.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, wavy dark hair, wearing a gold and blue patterned halter dress with a white shawl.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple, plain, light-colored interior wall.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a respectful and warm digital greeting for the Lunar New Year. The speaker introduces herself as the viewers' son's girlfriend and politely explains that she cannot visit due to work commitments. She concludes by offering traditional holiday wishes, aiming to maintain a good relationship with her partner's parents through a thoughtful video message.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: A common type of short-form social content where individuals share personal greetings or updates with a wider or specific social circle.
